name: First Bancorp, Inc /ME/
business: The First Bancorp, Inc., through its subsidiary First National Bank, offers traditional banking products and services including deposit accounts, cash management, payment processing, and consumer, commercial, and mortgage loans, as well as investment management and private banking through First National Wealth Management. The company serves customers in its Mid-Coast and Eastern Maine market area, primarily small businesses, government entities, non-profit organizations, and individuals.

exposures.sentence: For additional information, see Item 1C. "Cybersecurity" for a discussion of our cybersecurity risk management and strategy and oversight of risks from cybersecurity threats.
The introduction and acceptance of various digital currencies represents an emerging form of competition for deposits and payment services.
